summary: Customer-focused Field Service and Desktop Support Engineer with 10 years of hands-on IT experience across corporate office and manufacturing environments. Specialized in mobile device fleet support, walkup and deskside assistance, and end-to-end asset lifecycle management. Expert in ordering, provisioning, and setting up devices using iOS/macOS tools and MDM platforms, as well as executing secure device retirement and decommissioning processes. Proven ability to resolve ticketing queues via Daimler's IT Shop and ServiceNow within strict SLAs.

bullets: Provide customer-first walkup, deskside, and remote support for corporate users, resolving mobile device, OS, and software issues.
Order, receive, and provision mobile device fleet inventory (iOS, macOS, and Windows) for corporate end-users and new hires.
Setup and configure client devices using enterprise macOS/iOS tools, configuration profiles, and MDM platforms (Intune, MobileIron, Ivanti).
Execute hardware decommissioning and device retirement processes, ensuring secure data wiping, asset de-registration, and resource reclamation.
Utilize Daimler systems and the internal IT Shop portal to manage asset lifecycles, assign hardware, and resolve ticket escalations under strict SLAs.
Develop and enhance user-facing setup guides in Confluence to streamline self-service deployments and remote enrollment.
Managed high-volume walkup helpdesk operations, providing onsite desktop and peripheral support via walk-ins and ServiceNow tickets.
Managed the lifecycle of desktop and mobile assets, from initial hardware ordering, provisioning, and Ivanti imaging to secure device retirement.
Installed and administered Meraki SD-WAN devices and resolved local networking issues (IP addressing, DNS, DHCP).
Setup, configured, and troubleshot Zoom/Teams conference rooms and A/V equipment.
Administered Active Directory (AD) and Okta for user lifecycle management, group policy updates, and access controls.
Deployed corporate cell phones utilizing Ivanti/MobileIron MDM and provided Cisco VOIP Jr. Admin support.

experience.role: Network / Microsoft Technology Lab Volunteer Technician
bullets: Troubleshot Cisco routing and switching hardware, Microsoft Active Directory forests, and Linux servers.
Diagnosed, replaced, and maintained Cisco physical hardware (HWICs, SMART-Serial, interfaces).
Performed rack and hardware maintenance including SAN hot-swapping and UPS battery replacement.
Supported lab infrastructure migrations and mentored students in network subnetting.

experience.company: MoJoe Enterprises LLC / Rock That Media LLC
bullets: Executed login scripts, managed client system rollouts, and configured Windows desktop environments.
Investigated and diagnosed operating system and hardware performance issues.
Administered local systems infrastructure and trained staff on network security awareness.
